w:description.w:val: Expresses the sum/difference of the sines of two numbers as a product
Root of the equation ax^2 + bx + c = 0
Fourier series for a function of period 2L
Expresses the sum of the cosines of two numbers as a product
Surface area of a circle with radius r
Expansion of the sum (x + a) to the power of n
Expansion of the sum (1+x) to the power of n
Taylor expansion of e to the power of x
Relationship between the sides of a right triangle with legs a and b, and hypotenuse c
